name: io.github.Ringosystems/homey-wan-kenobi-mcp
description: MCP server for Homey Pro: 60 tools for devices, flows, energy, and Z-Wave/Zigbee diagnostics.
title: Homey-Wan-Kenobi MCP

environmentVariables.name: HOMEY_ADDRESS
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of your Homey Pro local API, e.g. http://192.168.1.10

environmentVariables.name: HOMEY_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Homey local API key (my.homey.app > Settings > API keys)
